title: Create:Egg Production
description: A method about egg production with create.
body:
Adds a new method for mass-producing eggs. Requires Create as a dependency. By supplying water and seeds as materials and applying rotational power, it can continuously generate eggs.
Designed for players who prefer to avoid building large-scale chicken farms in vanilla survival.

Integrated with Ponder scenes and JEI。

v1.0.3: Added the Egg Incubator block, expanding egg utilization methods.

[source](https://github.com/Aupoex/CreateEggProduction)
